name: obsidian-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Obsidian vaults — read, write, search, and surgically edit notes, tags, and frontmatter via the Local REST API plugin. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

OBSIDIAN_API_KEY.title: Obsidian API Key
OBSIDIAN_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for the Obsidian Local REST API plugin (Settings → Community Plugins → Local REST API).

OBSIDIAN_BASE_URL.title: Obsidian Base URL
OBSIDIAN_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Obsidian Local REST API. Default: http://127.0.0.1:27123. Use https://127.0.0.1:27124 for the HTTPS port.

OBSIDIAN_VERIFY_SSL.title: Verify SSL
OBSIDIAN_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify the TLS certificate. Default false (plugin uses a self-signed cert).

OBSIDIAN_ENABLE_COMMANDS.title: Enable Commands
OBSIDIAN_ENABLE_COMMANDS.description: Opt-in flag for the command-palette pair (obsidian_list_commands + obsidian_execute_command). Off by default.

OBSIDIAN_READ_PATHS.title: Read Path Allowlist
OBSIDIAN_READ_PATHS.description: Comma-separated vault-relative folder allowlist for reads. Unset = full vault. Example: 'public/,projects/'.

OBSIDIAN_WRITE_PATHS.title: Write Path Allowlist
OBSIDIAN_WRITE_PATHS.description: Comma-separated vault-relative folder allowlist for writes. Unset = full vault. Example: 'projects/,scratch/'.

OBSIDIAN_READ_ONLY.title: Read-Only Mode
OBSIDIAN_READ_ONLY.description: Global read-only kill switch. When true, every write is denied. Default: false.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error). Default: info.
